content:
If caught, the backstabber is barred from items for two weeks & loses 50 XP.


📜 Rules for One-Shot Actions
✔ One attempt per student per semester.
✔ Consequences last beyond one session.

✅ Why This Works:
• Makes betrayal an enticing but risky option.
• Allows students to “play dirty” within structured mechanics.
• Reinforces literature’s themes of fate, consequence, and sacrifice.

📜 5. Streak System & Redemption Mechanics

📜 Rewards students who engage consistently & gives paths for redemption.

📜 Streak System (Perfect Performance Bonus)
